author: Britney Muller
title: SEO is Changing: Why Brand Mentions are the New Backlinks
content: Britney Muller's keynote addresses the fundamental shift in SEO strategy due to AI: brand mentions are now as important as backlinks for AI-driven search results. She explains how AI associates brand names with specific topics and solutions through entity authority. Her research demonstrates that brands earning both mentions and direct citations show 40% higher likelihood of consistent visibility in AI-generated answers. This represents a paradigm shift from traditional link-based SEO to focus on how AI systems learn to associate brands with topics. Muller emphasizes building entity moats through strategic data naming—creating unique branded datasets and metrics that AI systems cannot ignore or synthesize without citing the source.
